title: Godzilla vs Evangelion Pachinko discussion
wikitext:
[]: Godzilla vs Evangelion Pachinko discussion.             Quote Post by Gigabite_01 » Mon Dec 26, 2022 11:33 am If some watch videos about "P Godzilla vs Evangelion: G Cell Awakening", and know Japanese, explain lore please.

[]: Re: Godzilla vs Evangelion Pachinko discussion.             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Dec 26, 2022 3:38 pm I have neither watched the videos in question nor know any meaningful amount of Japanese, but I have enough experience with this kind of collab to seriously doubt that there is much in the way of lore there. The most common scenarios are either some form of universe-hopping, one simply showing up in the world of the other without anyone questioning it, or pretending that they always were in the same universe to begin with. Given that pachinko machines by nature of them being literally just gambling don't tend to have any meaningful amount of plot to their animated scenes, I'm guessing it goes completely unaddressed

[]: Re: Godzilla vs Evangelion Pachinko discussion.             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Mon Dec 26, 2022 4:06 pm This trailer includes English subtitles. Maybe this has some info? https://youtu.be/PgNvGUC6kQs

[]: Re: Godzilla vs Evangelion Pachinko discussion.             Quote Post by Gigabite_01 » Mon Dec 26, 2022 5:12 pm I mean, Japanese videos from people, who played this. They contain some "Lore" cutcsenes but I don't understand Japanese.

[]: Re: Godzilla vs Evangelion Pachinko discussion.             Quote Post by Registration2 » Wed Jan 11, 2023 11:51 pm The green jackets of g-force are pretty cool

[]: Re: Godzilla vs Evangelion Pachinko discussion.             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Nov 22, 2024 6:03 pm Funny that we even have this thread. Images of Asuka in the new Evangelion vs Godzilla pachinko. Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZSd-yrPh8mA They go kinda hard.

[]: Re: Godzilla vs Evangelion Pachinko discussion.             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Fri Nov 22, 2024 8:45 pm Interesting continuity of her NTE eye motif. Are the roses having to do with something from the Godzilla franchise?

[]: Re: Godzilla vs Evangelion Pachinko discussion.             Quote Post by Superblunt » Sat Nov 23, 2024 9:03 am The narration in the trailer tells about Biollante's cells having infected Asuka's body and consciousness.

[]: Re: Godzilla vs Evangelion Pachinko discussion.             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Tue Dec 03, 2024 10:46 am Apparently there is a new one that was just released, "Godzilla vs Evangelion Second Impact G". There is some footage coming out and it apparently has a lot of new video for it, like at least 10 minutes. Features a lot of characters. (ah, it's the same one from earlier trailers) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T8zl_xjhShI Hayashibara also releasing a new single as a theme song for it. https://www.barks.jp/news/?id=100025056 ... paign=feed
